title: java-maven-build
text: General Maven Java build guide. If the project has mvnw or mvnw.cmd, prefer the Maven Wrapper because it uses the project-selected Maven version. Quick compile: mvn compile or mvn -DskipTests compile. Run tests: mvn test. Full clean verification and package: mvn clean package. Install artifact into local Maven repository: mvn clean install. Common lifecycle order: validate, compile, test, package, verify, install, deploy. For multi-module Maven projects, use mvn -pl module-name -am test to test one module and also build required dependencies. Check java -version and mvn -version when build errors mention source/target, toolchains, or JAVA_HOME.
